mission.title: dapr: Enable GET for secret stores to dynamically fetch secrets
mission.description:
# Description

Enabling GET for secret stores to dynamically fetch secrets as described in #1034. Current work just enables the http endpoint.

## Issue reference

We strive to have all PR being opened based on an issue, where the problem or feature have been discussed prior to implementation.

Please reference the issue this PR will close: #1034

## Checklist

Please make sure you've  completed the relevant tasks for this PR, out of the following list:

* [x] Code compiles correctly
* [ ] Created/updated tests
* [x] Unit tests passing
* [ ] End-to-end tests passing
* [ ] Extended the documentation
* [ ] Specification has been updated
* [ ] Provided sample for the feature

resolution.summary: Great to see this! Can you please resolve conflicts?
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
